verdict: PARTIAL — shape=pre_post, sign matches but magnitude below threshold; |Δ_log|=0.07; threshold 35.0%, observed 7.0%
verdict_reason: shape=pre_post, sign matches but magnitude below threshold; |Δ_log|=0.07; threshold 35.0%, observed 7.0%
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if top-decile share of cumulative after-tax-income gain over 2018-2019 exceeds 35 percent AND the gradient (decile 10 minus decile 1 percentage-point change in after-tax income) exceeds 1.5 percentage points at p<0.10. REFUTED if top-decile share is below 25 percent or the gradient is below 0.5 percentage points at p<0.10.
falsification_test_text: US descriptive panel of after-tax income change by decile 2017-2019 using TPC/JCT distributional tables, cross-validated with CEX-SCF microdata.
